atc.title: ~ [ATC] Army Training Command ~
atc.description: ATC is the army’s primary training branch.

basic_training_unit.name: [BTU] Basic Training Unit
basic_training_unit.description: BTU handles training of new recruits.

officer_training_unit.name: [OTU] Officer Training Unit
officer_training_unit.description: OTU trains new officers for leadership roles.

ifb.title: ~ [IFB] Infantry Force Branch ~
ifb.description: IFB is the Amy’s primary fighting force responsible for fighting on the front lines, primarily specialising in ground, airborne and armoured methods of combat.

1st_light_infantry_division.name: [1LID] 1st Light Infantry Division
1st_light_infantry_division.description: 1LID is the primary infantry force for regular close quarters combat.

1st_airborne_assault_division.name: [1AAD] 1st Airborne Assault Division
1st_airborne_assault_division.description: 1AAD holds specialised light infantry capable of parachuting or repelling onto the front lines.

1st_armoured_division.name: [1AD] 1st Armoured Division
1st_armoured_division.description: 1AD holds the heavy mechanised and armoured portions of the infantry, changing the course of a battle for the better.

soc.title: ~ [SOC] Special Operations Command ~
soc.description: SOC holds the most elite special forces unit of the Calderian Army, that perform special operations missions such as hostage rescue. They are also responsible for Special Intelligence.

special_forces_directorate.name: [SFD] Special Forces Directorate
special_forces_directorate.description: SFD personel are the most elite fighting force of the Calderian Army. Performs special missions.

special_intelligence_bureau.name: [SIB] Special Intelligence Bureau
special_intelligence_bureau.description: SIB is a secretive branch responsible for gathering inteligence in battle and at base. {Primary Information Classified}

mp.title: ~ [MP] Military Police ~
mp.description: MP patrol and guard all army installations, ensuring personel are following rules and that the installations are defended

patrol_and_enforcement_detachment.name: [PED] Patrol & Enforcement Detachment
patrol_and_enforcement_detachment.description: PED are responsible for patrolling and guarding all army installations.

emergency_response_detachment.name: [ERD] Emergency Response Detachment
emergency_response_detachment.description: ERD assist the PED in daily duties but also respond to emergency mattters inside of the installations.

epa.title: ~ [EPA] Executive Protection Agency ~
epa.description: EPA is responsible for protecting high-value Calderian installations and high-ranking personel such as the President and members of the CSB

presidential_security_unit.name: [PSA] Presidential Security Unit
presidential_security_unit.description: PSA guards the President. Assists the ESU in guarding other personel and installations, if the President is not present.

executive_security_unit.name: [ESU] Executive Security Unit
executive_security_unit.description: ESU personel guard high-ranking personel and installations.

tactical_support_unit.name: [TSU] Tactical Support Unit
tactical_support_unit.description: TSU are specialised ESU to be deployed in specific scenarios such as airborne.
